Package cc.quaternion.potshaper

Enum Class PotFill.PatternType

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<PotFill.PatternType>
cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotFill.PatternType
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<PotFill.PatternType>, Constable
Enclosing class:
PotFill
public static enum PotFill.PatternType extends Enum<PotFill.PatternType>
Defines the pattern type for a pattern fill, corresponding to OpenXML preset patterns.
Since:
1.0

    • values

      public static PotFill.PatternType[] values()

    • valueOf

      public static PotFill.PatternType valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null
